summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solaris Films website iteration 4. All 47+ new dynamic pages working correctly: 22 city pages (/servizio-locale/:city), 10 info pages (/info/:slug), 15 focus tecnico pages (/focus-tecnico/:slug), and /profilo-solaris. All routes return 200 status. Footer has links to new sections. Navigation and existing pages still work. Backend APIs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: All new dynamic routes have proper data-testid attributes for testing
City pages correctly display city name and region (e.g., Roma/Lazio, Milano/Lombardia)
Info pages render specific content (norme list, garanzie details, glossario terms)
Focus tecnico pages grouped by category (Antisolari, Sicurezza, Privacy, Speciali)
Footer includes links to: Profilo Solaris, Focus Tecnico, Info e Norme, Servizio Locale
Navigation still works: Home, Servizi, Guida Tecnica, Chi Siamo, Blog, Contatti

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 47+ new pages and existing pages working)

seed_data_creation: Test contact and quote created during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features tested and working. New dynamic routes: /servizio-locale (22 cities), /info (10 pages), /focus-tecnico (15 pages), /profilo-solaris. All routes return 200. Footer has new section links. Existing pages (/privacy-policy, /guida-tecnica, homepage) still work. Backend APIs functional.

servizio_locale_index.details: Index page at /servizio-locale shows all 22 cities with correct data-testid attributes

servizio_locale_roma.details: City page shows 'Pellicole per vetri Roma' with Lazio region

servizio_locale_milano.details: City page shows 'Pellicole per vetri Milano' with Lombardia region

servizio_locale_all_cities.details: All 22 city routes return 200: roma, milano, firenze, napoli, torino, bologna, venezia, genova, bari, palermo, ancona, aosta, campobasso, catanzaro, cosenza, laquila, perugia, potenza, romagna, trento, trieste, udine

info_index.details: Index page at /info shows all 10 info pages

info_garanzie.details: Page shows guarantee details with '10 anni' and 'Dettaglio Garanzie' section

info_norme.details: Page shows norms list: UNI EN 7697, UNI EN 12600, UNI EN 356

info_glossario_termini.details: Page shows glossary terms: VLT, SHGC, UV, Sputtered, UNI EN 12600

info_all_pages.details: All 10 info routes return 200: norme, norma-brc, sicurezza-a-norma-di-legge, testo-unico-sulla-salute-e-sicurezza-sul-lavoro, sistemi-filtranti-dpr-59-09, istruzioni-e-manutenzione, garanzie, certificazione-nfrc, i-punti-di-forza, glossario-termini

focus_tecnico_index.details: Index page at /focus-tecnico shows all 15 pages grouped by category (Antisolari, Sicurezza, Privacy, Speciali)

focus_tecnico_sputtered.details: Page shows characteristics: sputtering, riflessione solare, Garanzia 10 anni

focus_tecnico_safetyshield.details: Page shows SafetyShield content: MADICO, esplosione, FrameGard

profilo_solaris.details: Page shows company profile with MADICO, 40+, 45.000+, ISO 9001, Distributore Esclusivo

footer_links.details: Footer has links to: Profilo Solaris, Focus Tecnico, Info e Norme, Servizio Locale

navigation.details: Navigation works: Home, Servizi, Guida Tecnica, Chi Siamo, Blog, Contatti

homepage.details: Homepage renders correctly with hero, MADICO, 40 anni content
